verdict.summary: Guide is broadly accurate and conservative for expats, but it overstates that recibos verdes always exclude IRS Automático and misses a few practical caveats around couples, e-Fatura deadlines, and mortgage deductions.

issues.current: Нет recibos verdes, ato isolado или другой atividade aberta
issues.problem: Too categorical. IRS Automático has in recent campaigns covered some Category B income under the simplified regime, especially certain service providers issuing invoices through the official system, subject to conditions and exclusions. Ato isolado and many self-employed/expat cases still usually require Modelo 3, but 'any recibos verdes / any atividade aberta' as an absolute exclusion is misleading.
issues.suggestion: Replace with: "Если были recibos verdes/atividade aberta, не подтверждайте автоматически без проверки: некоторые простые случаи Categoria B в regime simplificado могут быть покрыты IRS Automático, но многие ситуации требуют обычную Modelo 3 с Anexo B."
issues.source: Código do IRS art. 58-A; Portal das Finanças — IRS Automático eligibility rules

issues.current: Вы открывали atividade и выставляли recibos verdes — нужен Anexo B
issues.problem: This repeats the same overstatement. Category B normally uses Anexo B in a manual Modelo 3, but some simplified Category B cases may be included in IRS Automático. The safer instruction is to verify eligibility rather than say Anexo B is always required.
issues.suggestion: Write: "Вы открывали atividade и выставляли recibos verdes — проверьте, покрывает ли Portal ваш случай в IRS Automático. Если нет, нужна обычная Modelo 3 с Anexo B."
issues.source: Código do IRS art. 58-A; Portal das Finanças — IRS Automático eligibility rules

issues.current: Если вы married/united de facto, Portal das Finanças обычно показывает варианты: отдельная подача и совместная подача. Не выбирайте автоматически самый первый вариант — сравните симуляции.
issues.problem: Correct but missing an important caveat: if a married/united de facto couple does nothing and IRS Automático becomes final by inaction, the default is not necessarily the most favourable joint option; taxpayers should actively confirm the preferred option before the deadline.
issues.suggestion: Add: "Важно: если ничего не подтвердить до 30 июня, автоматическое превращение в окончательную декларацию может идти по варианту tributação separada; совместную подачу нужно подтвердить обоим налогоплательщикам в срок."

issues.current: Расходы в e-Fatura проверены до дедлайнов кампании
issues.problem: Too vague for a time-sensitive tax guide. Many relevant steps happen before the IRS filing window opens, especially household/dependant communication and invoice validation. Readers may think they can fix e-Fatura during the 1 April–30 June filing period.
issues.suggestion: Specify the deadlines by type, or write more safely: "Расходы и состав семьи проверены в e-Fatura/Portal das Finanças в установленные сроки до подачи IRS; после открытия кампании часть данных уже нельзя исправить обычным способом."

issues.current: Данные e-Fatura неполные: крупные медицинские, образовательные, арендные или mortgage-расходы не подтянулись
issues.problem: The reference to mortgage expenses is potentially misleading. Portuguese IRS deductions for housing loan interest are limited and do not apply to ordinary mortgage principal payments; eligibility depends on the type/date/purpose of the loan and legal rules in force. This should not be presented alongside ordinary medical/education/rent expenses without caveat.
issues.suggestion: Replace with: "... медицинские, образовательные, арендные или, если применимо, допустимые проценты по жилищному кредиту не подтянулись".

issues.problem: This is an official domain but only a generic landing page. For eligibility and deadlines, a sensitive tax guide should cite a specific AT page/FAQ/news item for IRS Automático or the IRS campaign calendar, otherwise readers cannot verify the exact conditions.
issues.suggestion: Use a specific Portal das Finanças/AT URL for 'IRS Automático' and a specific IRS 2026 calendar/FAQ page, not only the generic info portal homepage.

missing_topics: Exact IRS 2026 pre-filing deadlines: household composition, e-Fatura invoice validation, deduction claims/complaints
Default outcome for married/united de facto taxpayers if no automatic declaration option is actively confirmed
Clarification that some simplified Category B/recibos verdes cases may be eligible for IRS Automático, but should be checked case by case
What to do after an automatic declaration becomes final by inaction: declaração de substituição / correction routes and timing
Caveat that mortgage deductions are limited and generally relate to eligible housing loan interest, not ordinary mortgage payments
